headline: About me
overview: I am a product-focused developer who enjoys turning real-world problems into polished digital experiences. I care deeply about clean architecture, thoughtful interactions, and long-term maintainability.

journey.title: Started with curiosity
journey.description: I began by exploring web fundamentals and quickly became interested in building complete end-to-end solutions.

journey.title: Built real projects
journey.description: I moved from tutorials to practical projects, learning how to structure scalable frontends and reliable APIs.

journey.title: Focused on UX and quality
journey.description: Now I prioritize user experience, performance, and developer-friendly systems that are easy to evolve.

principles: Design for real users, not just screenshots
